---
name: Enhancement
about: Propose a change that's bigger than a routine bump or doc tweak
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

<!--
For routine version bumps, prefer the Package Manager subagent or Renovate —
not a hand-rolled issue. See docs/renovate.md.

For a decision worth pinning before code lands (architecture, policy,
naming conventions), open an "ADR proposal" instead.
-->

## Proposal

<!-- What should change, in one short paragraph. -->

## Motivation

<!-- The friction this removes or the capability it adds. Concrete examples win. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- At least one. "Do nothing" is a valid alternative — state the cost. -->

## Principle filter

<!-- How does this hold up against the filters in docs/core-principles.md?
     Reproducibility, security, human-gated taste, when-to-write-an-ADR. -->

## Acceptance

- [ ] <!-- concrete check #1 -->
- [ ] <!-- concrete check #2 -->
- [ ] <!-- … -->

## Notes for agents

<!-- Optional. Hand-off context if a coding agent will implement this:
     which files, expected blast radius, tests to add. -->
